_doc: Plain chore commit with no decision-language in body. Pre-fix this would have skipped (already returned null) — locks the regression so future tightening doesn't accidentally start stubbing.
subject: chore(emit): wire per-rule budget BLOCK validator + abridge zero-tolerance.md
body: Lift validator out of the inline emitter path; adds 38 lines and a regression test for the cap arithmetic. No design choice; mechanical extraction.
